What_are_quick_actions_desc.message:
eJOY AI can be easily accessed through Quick Actions, which offers an easy way to process selected text.
As soon as you select any text on a web page, a float button appears, enabling you to instantly translate, rewrite or explain the text with just one click. In addition, you can rearrange the order of the tools for even more convenience.

What_are_sidebar_functions_desc.message:
1. Summarize: Let AI condense videos or articles into concise summaries, highlighting the key points and essential information you need.
2. Deep dive: Simplify complex topics with explanations, real-life examples, quizzes, and thought-provoking questions designed to enhance your understanding.

What_is_Sidebar_desc.message:
1. Summarize: Let AI condense videos or articles into concise summaries, highlighting the key points and essential information you need.
2. Deep dive: Simplify complex topics with explanations, real-life examples, quizzes, and thought-provoking questions designed to enhance your understanding.
3. Ask AI: Have questions about the content? Just ask! The AI is ready to provide clear, accurate answers tailored to your needs.

support_email_body.message:
Hello eJOY Team,
I'm writing because I received a notification that my AI queries are running low while I was using the AI translation feature on a video.
Could you please provide me with information on the options to upgrade my plan or purchase more AI queries?
For your reference, my account email is: [your email]
Thank & Best regards,

tooltip_status_wb7_content1.message: By understanding your study progress, you will plan your review better. eJOY provides 4 main types of info.

tooltip_status_wb7_content2.message: Fluency: shows how well you have learnt this word in your Daily Challenge

tooltip_status_wb7_content3.message: The more correct answers you have and the faster you answer, the higher the fluency is.

tooltip_status_wb7_content4.message: Difficulty: shows how hard you've studied this word. The more incorrect answers you gave in Daily Challenge, the more difficult the word is.

tooltip_status_wb7_content5.message: Number of reviews: shows how many times you have reviewed the word.

tooltip_status_wb7_content6.message: Word link: shows the word origin. Not all words will have word link information.
